channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

Near Henshaw street

1 large pile of cardboard 1 small fridge dumped on the path on Southwood Road.

item.title: Big pothole, 11th June
item.description:
There is a big pothole in the middle of the road approaching the junction of white hart lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selby Road, Greater London

item.title: Building materials being left outside, 11th June
item.description:
Building materials being left outside 15 blocking the prevent for the residents to get pass.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dale Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dilapidated house causing rodent infestation and damp, 11th June
item.description:
The health and security hazards at 32 Martello St have escalated. This negatively impacts 30 Martello St. Scaffolding has been in place at front and rear for 6–7 years with no work. The extreme level of clutter is attracts rodents and causes infestations.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Martello Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bricks removed, 11th June
item.description:
Bricks have been removed on a wall over the bridge in Crofton Avenue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88, Crofton Avenue, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large planks and wooden pallet on the pavement, 11th June
item.description:
Is there nothing that can be done to deter fly tipping here? Items are left almost daily

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Margaret Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bedroom furniture dumped here 11/6/26, 11th June
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead

item.title: Overgrown bushes preventing the use of the pavement, 11th June
item.description:
Overgrown bushes on Heron Way and Motherwell way all around the outside B&Q preventing the use of the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heron Way, West Thurrock, South Ockendon

item.title: Overgrown bushes preventing the use of the Pavement, 11th June
item.description:
The bushes on Weston and Eastern Avenues are overgrown and prevent use of the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastern Avenue, West Thurrock, South Ockendon

item.title: Blocked drain gully, 11th June
item.description:
Southgate bound outside 109a. Rainwater not able to soakaway.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Dragon Lane, Southgate

item.title: Sofa and mattress dumped on footpath, 11th June
item.description:
This whole section has seen yet more flytipping. There's a sofa, a mattress and various piles of household waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton

item.title: On the corner here, 11th June
item.description:
Blue bag Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, London

item.title: Section of Croftdown Road, 11th June
item.description:
Parking signs painted over again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croftdown Road, Dartmouth Park, Greater London

item.title: Victoria Mews, 11th June
item.description:
Burst bags of waste including food waste that were left by over flowing bins. The bin men came and emptied the bins and failed to take the burst bags right next to the bins.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Mews, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: 71 Priory Park Road NW6 7UN, 11th June
item.description:
71 Priory Park Road was subject to a closure notice a few weeks back. Since then, the huge amount of waste outside the property has not been disposed of. This is becoming a health hazard, with smells, odors and rodents seen. Whilst it is on private property, neighbors have no way of contacting the owner.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Over grown vegetation, 11th June
item.description:
Overgrown vegetation along the fence line this has been reported before, but the report always gets closed down and says it’s been investigated. This is ridiculous. I shouldn’t have to report things over and over again for them still not to be done as you can see in the picture. It’s growing over the fence which is also weaken in the fence and eventually will collapse. There isn’t even a shrub bed there. It’s just overgrown weeds which causes pest harbour in the area. Distressing the neighbours as constant noise of an evening night time. Including flies.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blean Grove, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At and around the bus stop, 11th June
item.description:
A lot of litter at this bus stop. In the bus shelter itself and on both sides adjacent. Sorry didn't have phone with me to take photos Many thanks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide canister, 11th June
item.description:
Black NO canister sitting next to the public tree, looks like it's been there a while

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87, Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
